rule: Authority evidence cannot be public or broadly shared.
Only privacy reviewer and required owner may access.
Support and incident records stay in private support route.
Advisory comments can be public-safe if labelled non-approval.
Logs are private, time-limited, and owner-reviewable.
Provider access must be contract-bound and revocable.
Cultural material never enters public package.
Archive index private; public status only.
Only approved outcome lines can be public.
Static demo can show fake/sample counts and status.
